economic_notes: Bridge River Development Corporation (100% owned, modified equity method) had revenues of $637,850 and net income of $59,199. Lillooet Salish Enterprises Ltd. (50% owned, cost method). COVID-19 pandemic noted as subsequent event with uncertain impact on operations.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Bridge River Development Corporation is accounted for by the modified equity method (GBE) - 100% owned but not consolidated. Lillooet Salish Enterprises Ltd. (50% owned) is accounted for at cost. Restricted cash movement shown in cash flow but balance sheet detail not separately stated. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($1,826,909) + CMHC ($107,089) + Additional government funding ($173,494) + DFO ($16,671) + First Nations Health Authority ($601,180) = $2,725,263. OSR includes rental income, BC Hydro payments, trust allocation, investment income, contributions, other revenue, allocation to RRF, surplus recoveries, administration fees, and First Nation Gaming. Annual debt service reflects social housing amortization equal to principal reduction per CMHC agreement ($117,111). COVID-19 pandemic disclosed as subsequent event.
